violations.text: Raw hamburger patties were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as mushrooms and onions in the grill refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Oven hood was observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
Raw hamburgers stored above raw onion, mushrooms and hotdogs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
2 door lowboy gaskets observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Non-food contact surfaces of oven and 2 door freezer observed with dust. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Kitchen hood at oven observed with dust and soil residue. Physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
